item.title: Home
item.content:encoded:
Corporate Strategy & Turnaround

Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health

A breakthrough prescription of surgery, resuscitation, and nursing that has helped countless companies recover and thrive.

Dr Mike Teng
“Retired CEO and expert consultant in corporate turnaround as well as best-selling author. My mission now is to democratize elite business expertise through AI, helping companies find both secular and spiritual solutions to complex corporate challenges.”

Featured Video

Introducing Corporate Turnaround

Welcome

Welcome to the Digital Home of Dr. Mike Teng

Is downsizing the only answer to solving corporate woes? Why is your company struggling to grow? Why do businesses fall sick, recover, and subsequently succumb to the exact same ailments? If these questions sound familiar, chances are your company is in a slump, and it may feel like the situation will not improve anytime soon.

Like many enterprises, yours may have fallen ill due to "corporate viruses"—such as global economic slowdowns, the rapid disruptions of globalization, unforeseen crises, or incompetent management. However, there is hope. Even dying companies can attain holistic, long-term recovery by applying a new, breakthrough prescription of surgery, resuscitation, and nursing.

The Blueprint for Recovery: A Best-Selling Book, Not Just a Guide

Using practical medical analogies, Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health is not merely a guide; it is a foundational, best-selling book that prescribes effective, easy-to-administer turnaround techniques in precisely the right doses.

Reformulated to be universally applicable and user-friendly, this book dismantles the misconception that an expensive, adversarial bankruptcy is the only way out of crippling debt. Instead, it walks distressed business owners through practical, out-of-court alternatives. This three-step methodology has earned the praise of world-renowned business tycoons and academia, proudly carrying endorsements from international management guru Professor Philip Kotler, alongside prominent business tycoons Mr. Oei Hong Leong and Dr. Y.Y. Wong.

A Wealth of Knowledge: Exploring the Insights of www.miketeng.com

While Corporate Turnaround serves as the cornerstone of Dr. Teng's methodology, this website is a comprehensive library of his three decades of high-level strategic consulting and turning around troubled businesses as the CEO.

We invite you to explore the sub-headers and categories featured across this site. By navigating through the carefully curated resources such as articles, interviews and media featuring Dr Teng, you will unlock actionable insights and immediately applicable benefits. You will discover practical frameworks for reaching amicable agreements with creditors, restoring cash flow, and protecting your assets without paying exorbitant hourly consulting fees.

Exploring these sections and resources will equip you with a 360-degree view of executive leadership and corporate survival and success.

Holistic Restoration: Secular and Spiritual

The true essence of Dr. Teng's mission extends far beyond balance sheets, debt haircuts, and creditor negotiations. Business crises do not happen in a vacuum; they take a devastating emotional, physical, and spiritual toll on founders, their employees, and their families.

These more than twenty five books authored by Dr Teng recognize that a company is not an inanimate object, but a living organism. The intellectual, physical, and spiritual aspects of a business leader's life are intricately intertwined. When a company is "sick," its leaders are almost always operating from a place of intense fear, isolation, and spiritual exhaustion.

Therefore, a core purpose of Dr. Teng's writing is to serve as a bridge to both secular and spiritual restoration. It is an open invitation for burdened SME owners to seek Jesus Christ for the spiritual help, grace, and ultimate wisdom that secular business strategies simply cannot provide. By integrating practical corporate turnaround mechanics with profound spiritual insights, this platform offers a holistic path to wellness, reminding leaders that while their earthly businesses can be restructured and saved, their ultimate security rests in faith.

The AI Powerhouse of Corporate Turnaround

Today, Dr. Teng's life's work—including this best-selling book and all the insights featured on this site—has been fully amalgamated into www.corporateturnaroundcentre.com.

Operating entirely free of charge, this platform is the AI Powerhouse of Corporate Turnaround. It features 19 dedicated AI business applications specifically engineered to help SMEs journey through their most severe financial challenges and transform to grow. This suite of professional-level diagnostic tools democratizes high-level consulting, providing immediate, confidential assessments anytime, anywhere.

It is a sanctuary for those who feel they have nowhere else to turn. We invite you to read, explore the resources within this site, visit the AI platform, and find true hope for both your enterprise and your soul.

Wishing you corporate success

Dr Mike Teng
“Retired CEO and expert consultant in corporate turnaround as well as best-selling author. My mission now is to democratize elite business expertise through AI, helping companies find both secular and spiritual solutions to complex corporate challenges.”

Published Works

Books by Dr Mike Teng

Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health. Available in English, Mandarin, Indonesian, and Vietnamese

Corporate Turnaround (English)

Corporate Turnaround (Mandarin)

Corporate Turnaround (Indonesian)

Corporate Turnaround (Vietnamese)

View all 52 books by Dr Mike Teng →

item.title: Contact
item.content:encoded:
Contact

Get in touch with Corporate Turnaround Centre

Corporate Turnaround Centre Pte Ltd

An AI Powerhouse democratizing elite turnaround strategy anywhere, anytime. Incorporated in 2008. Corporate Turnaround Centre and all its associated platforms provide management consultancy information for educational use only and are not a licensed financial advisor.

Support the Mission
Sustaining this legacy requires ongoing server costs. We invite your support through a Sustainability Contribution:
Make a Contribution via PayPal

Email:
admin@corporateturnaroundcentre.com

Websites:
www.corporateturnaroundcentre.com
www.miketeng.com

Disclaimer:
AI is subject to “hallucinations.” Verified strategic decisions and outcomes remain your sole responsibility. We disclaim all liability for financial losses.

item.title: Start Here
item.content:encoded:
A Mission of Stewardship

Democratizing Elite Wisdom for Corporate Restoration

A Message from Dr. Mike Teng

Dear Fellow Leader and Business Owner,

I write to you as I enter what I call the “last mile” of my journey. After more than 40 years in corporate leadership—including 25 years as CEO across multinational corporations, publicly listed firms, and SMEs—I have reached a season of retirement.

Yet, I do not see retirement as a conclusion, but as a mandate for stewardship.

The Urgent Need for Corporate Turnaround

We are navigating unprecedented global economic headwinds. Escalating geopolitical tensions, mounting sovereign debt, oil price volatility, persistent inflation, and the looming threat of recession are pushing many businesses to the brink.

At the same time, rapid advancements in artificial intelligence, alongside the rise of low-cost competitors, are forcing companies to rethink and transform their business models.

In this volatile environment, businesses increasingly require not just survival strategies, but structured, professional turnaround execution.

My mission is simple: To ensure that the strategic “surgery” needed to save distressed companies—and the “resuscitation” and “nursing” required for recovery and growth—are no longer exclusive to large corporations or elite consultancy firms.

The AI Powerhouse & Knowledge Repository

To meet this need, I have built an AI-powered platform at www.corporateturnaroundcentre.com.

This platform serves as the core of this initiative—democratizing access to results-proven, elite management consultancy for business owners everywhere.

Complementing this is www.miketeng.com, a secondary platform functioning as a digital library of my life’s work, providing access to:

  • Proprietary turnaround methodologies
  • Over 52 published management volumes in English and Mandarin, including Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health
  • Media features from Channel News Asia, The Straits Times, The Business Times, BFM 89.9, and Money FM 89.3
  • Articles on business diagnosis, innovation, productivity and M&A
  • Practical toolkits and advisory resources

A Legacy That Outlasts the Leader

Expertise no longer needs to retire with the professional.

Through artificial intelligence, it is now possible to preserve decades of tacit knowledge and create a self-sustaining “digital brain” that continues to serve future generations.

This AI has been trained on nearly 100 proprietary sources, including my books, media contributions, and decades of hands-on CEO and advisory experience.

My goal is to leave behind a legacy that continues to guide leaders long after I am gone—and to encourage others to do the same.

How This Platform Can Serve You

The Corporate Turnaround Centre integrates 19 specialized AI applications designed as your first line of defense.

1. Website Guide

Navigate seamlessly through 8 Centres of Excellence.

2. Quick Answers

  • Ask Dr. Mike Teng: Access insights drawn from 100+ proprietary knowledge sources
  • FAQ: Be directed to the most relevant Centre of Excellence

3. Assessments

  • Quick Assessments: High-level insights when time is limited
  • Demo: Experience how the system works
  • Self-Assessments: Generate a personalized 1,000–2,000-word strategic roadmap

4. Simulations

  • Crisis & Boardroom Simulators: Practice decision-making under pressure
  • Theory-to-Practice Training: Learn how to respond to real-world turnaround scenarios before they happen

Benefits of the AI Powerhouse

  • Early Detection & Diagnostics: Identify root causes before they become critical
  • Privacy & Efficiency: Secure, confidential, and time-efficient assessments
  • Expertise & Authority: Objective, structured guidance across 8 specialist domains
  • Strategic Growth: Tailored recommendations to support recovery and expansion
  • Actionable Implementation: Clear transformation pathways and milestone tracking
  • Faith & Values-Based Options: Optional integration of spiritual guidance and targeted prayer
  • Holistic Corporate Health: Combining strategic clarity with emotional and spiritual resilience

Secular Strategy & Spiritual Resilience

Business challenges today are complex and often beyond direct control. In times of severe stress and uncertainty, leaders need both strategic clarity and inner resilience.

Secular Methodology: The AI applies a structured “Surgery, Resuscitation, and Nursing” framework to deliver deep-dive diagnostic reports and strategic direction.

Ethical & Spiritual Foundation (Optional): For those who seek it, the platform provides targeted prayers and scriptural guidance aligned with specific business challenges—supporting emotional stability and clarity during crisis.

Privacy by Design

Your confidentiality is fully protected.

  • Inputs are processed transiently
  • No data is stored or reviewed
  • No consultation records are retained
  • Any request for email is solely for disclaimer and responsible-use purposes

You may engage the platform freely, privately, and securely at any time.

A Call for Sustainability Contributions

This platform is currently in its Beta phase.

As I am retired, I am no longer able to provide one-on-one consulting. This AI platform serves as my surrogate—offering full access at no cost.

However, maintaining and expanding these AI systems involves significant infrastructure costs.

If you find value in this initiative, I invite you to make a sustainability contribution. Every contribution goes toward maintaining and expanding this resource for the global business community.

A Professional Framework for Wisdom Sharing

To preserve the integrity and sustainability of this mission:

  • Provision of Information: These tools are for informational and educational purposes only
  • Individual Responsibility: Users remain the final decision-makers and are encouraged to seek additional professional advice
  • Liability Limitation: Liability is capped at $0 (or the value of any contribution made)

Thank you for allowing me to walk this “last mile” alongside you.
Together, we can stabilize businesses, preserve livelihoods, and restore hope through wisdom.

With gratitude and purpose,

Dr. Mike Teng
Principal Steward / Legacy Mentor / Founder
Corporate Turnaround Centre Pte Ltd

item.title: About the Author
item.content:encoded:
About the Author

Background of Dr Mike Teng

About the Author: Dr. Mike Teng

DBA (AU), MBA (NUS), BEng (NUS), FCMI, FCIM, FMIS, FIMechE, FIET, PEng (S), CEng, SMSCS, RMC, ACTA

Dr. Mike Teng is a renowned turnaround expert and the author of the best-selling book “Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health.” His work is highly regarded in the global business community, receiving prestigious endorsements from management guru Professor Philip Kotler and prominent business leaders Mr. Oei Hong Leong and Dr. YY Wong.

With a bibliography of more than twenty-five titles, Dr. Teng is a leading voice on corporate transformation, productivity, and innovation. His insights are frequently sought after by the national press and regional broadcasters. Notably, he was featured in The Straits Times as the “Man Who Turns Red into Black,” labeled a “Turnaround Manager” by World Executive’s Digest, and recognized as a “Marketing Maven” by Singapore Marketer.

Professional Track Record

Dr. Teng brings over 40 years of experience in leading corporate and business model transformations across the Asia Pacific region. For 25 of those years, he served as Chief Executive Officer who successfully turned around and transformed various multi-national corporations, publicly listed companies, and SMEs. Beyond his executive roles, he has served as a strategic advisor to several Boards of Directors of listed companies and provided high-level management consultancy services across Southeast Asia, China, and Africa.

Leadership & Academic Excellence

A dedicated leader in the professional community, Dr. Teng served on the Executive Council of the Marketing Institute of Singapore for fourteen years, including four years as President. He is also the Past President of the NUS MBA Alumni and past Chairman of the Chartered Management Institute (Singapore Branch).

Dr. Teng holds a Doctor in Business Administration (DBA) from Adelaide University, as well as an MBA and Bachelor in Mechanical Engineering (BEng) from the National University of Singapore. He is a registered Professional Engineer (P Eng, Singapore) and Chartered Engineer (C Eng, UK). He is a Fellow of several prestigious institutions, including:

  • FCIM (Chartered Institute of Marketing)
  • FCMI (Chartered Management Institute)
  • FIMechE (Institution of Mechanical Engineers)
  • FIET (Institution of Engineering and Technology)
  • FMIS (Marketing Institute of Singapore)

He is also a Registered Management Consultant (RMC) and holds an ACTA certification recognized by the Singapore government.

Mission: Democratizing Expertise through AI

As a retired CEO and expert corporate turnaround consultant, Dr. Teng’s current mission is to democratize elite business expertise through Artificial Intelligence. He develops AI-driven platforms, such as www.corporateturnaroundcentre.com, which feature 19 specialized AI applications. These tools are designed to guide companies through his proven methodology—encompassing surgery, resuscitation, and therapy—to find both secular and spiritual solutions for their most pressing corporate challenges.

Chinese Biography

邓耀兴博士的背景

邓博士（Dr Mike Teng）于 2002 年出版了另一部畅销书《企业扭转：让病危企业起死回生》。该书获得管理学大师菲利普·科特勒教授（Professor Philip Kotler）以及企业巨擘黄鸿年先生（Mr Oei Hong Leong）和黄源源博士（Dr YY Wong）的推荐。他至今已撰写超过二十七本管理类书籍，主要涵盖企业扭转、转型、并购、生产力与创新等主题。

他曾被新加坡国家级报章《海峡时报》于 1996 年 3 月 16 日报道为"让亏损企业起死回生的人"。在 1997 年 10 月的《World Executive's Digest》中，他被誉为"企业扭转经理"；在 2009 年的《Singapore Marketer》中，他则被称为"营销大师"（Marketing Maven）。

他在亚太地区领导企业与商业模式转型方面拥有超过四十年的经验。其中，他在跨国公司、上市公司以及中小型企业担任首席执行官长达二十五年。他也曾为多家上市公司的董事会提供咨询，并在东南亚、中国和非洲提供高层管理顾问服务。

邓博士曾在新加坡市场营销学院（Marketing Institute of Singapore，国家级营销协会）担任执行理事会成员长达十四年，并在最后四年出任会长。他亦曾担任新加坡国立大学 MBA 校友会会长，以及英国特许管理协会（Chartered Management Institute）新加坡分会的前任会长与前任主席。

邓博士拥有阿德莱德大学（Adelaide University）的工商管理博士（DBA）学位，以及新加坡国立大学的工商管理硕士（MBA）和机械工程学士（BEng）学位。他同时是新加坡注册专业工程师（P Eng, Singapore）、英国特许工程师（C Eng, UK），并是多家国际知名专业机构的资深会员，包括：英国特许市场营销协会（FCIM）、英国特许管理协会（FCMI）、英国机械工程师学会（FIMechE）、新加坡市场营销学院（FMIS）、英国电机工程师学会（FIEE）以及新加坡电脑学会高级会员（SMSCS）。此外，他也是新加坡政府认可的管理顾问（RMC）及高级培训与评估证书（ACTA）持有者。

作为退休的首席执行官与企业扭转专家，邓博士现今的使命是通过人工智能普及顶尖商业智慧。他打造了 AI 平台 www.corporateturnaroundcentre.com，内含 19 个 AI 应用程序，引导企业从世俗与属灵两个层面寻找解决最紧迫企业挑战的方法。

item.title: About the Book
item.content:encoded:
About the Book

Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health

Table of Contents

Complete Chapter Listing

  • Figures and Tables (xi)
  • About the Author (xiii)
  • Foreword (xv)
  • Preface (xvii)
  • Acknowledgements (xxi)
  • Chapter One Introduction (page 1)
  • Chapter Two Physical and Fiscal Health (page 7)
    • Medical Analogy: Human Being Versus Company
    • Why Do Companies Fail?
    • Internal and External Corporate Viruses
    • The Asian Virus
    • Competition Competition Competition
    • Going Back to the Basics
  • Chapter Three Phase I Treatment: Surgery (page 40)
    • Example: Local Company Afflicted with Cancer
    • What is the Surgical Phase?
    • Communication
    • Concentration
    • Cost Control
    • Cash Flow
    • Phase I is Not Enough
  • Chapter Four Phase II Treatment: Resuscitation (page 74)
    • Example: Multinational Company with a Heart Problem
    • What is the Resuscitation Phase?
    • Ascertaining Corporate Objectives
    • Staying on the Ground/Using Consultants (If Necessary)
    • Focusing on Customers and Competitors
    • Developing the Right Product and Price
    • Implementing an Aggressive Marketing Strategy
    • Differentiating Yourself Using Service Quality
    • Strengthening Your Brand Name
    • Investing in Future Expansions
    • Why is Phase III Necessary?
  • Chapter Five Phase III Treatment: Nursing (page 119)
    • Example: Organisation with a Weak Immune System
    • What is the Nursing Phase?
    • Incorporating a New Corporate Philosophy
    • Strengthening the Free Flow of Internal Energy
    • Instilling a Strong and Healthy Corporate Culture
    • Engendering Action-driven Orientation
    • Eating a Balanced Diet: Vision Feedback Action
    • Promoting Active Communication
    • Cultivating a Positive Mental Attitude
    • Emphasising Exercise: Training and Development
    • People People People
  • Chapter Six Conclusion (page 188)
    • Possible Applications of the Turnaround Phases
    • Parallels Between Corporate Turnaround and Medical Treatments
    • A Comparative Summary of the Turnaround Phases
  • Epilogue (page 197)
  • Further Reading (page 201)
  • Index (page 203)

item.title: Other Books
item.content:encoded:
Other Books by Dr Mike Teng

Over 52 books on turnaround, transformation, and leadership

All of Dr Teng's books in English and Mandarin are available for sale on www.amazon.com

English Collection

English Books by Dr Mike Teng

Each cover shows the front and back pages of the book.

The English Books Collection (28 titles) by Dr. Mike Teng showcases a comprehensive body of work that distills decades of leadership, corporate turnaround, and management experience into practical, actionable insights. Each book combines rigorous frameworks with real-world relevance, offering readers clear guidance on navigating organisational challenges, driving transformation, and building sustainable performance. Together, these titles form a powerful knowledge library for leaders, managers, consultants, and anyone seeking to strengthen their strategic and operational capabilities.

华文书籍

Mandarin Books (华文书籍)

邓博士的所有中英文著作均可在 www.amazon.com 购买。

邓博士英文著作系列 (24 书名)系统汇集了他数十年来在领导力、企业扭转与管理领域的深厚经验，并将其提炼为实用、可操作的知识框架。每本书都结合严谨的方法论与真实案例，为读者提供清晰的指引，帮助他们应对组织挑战、推动变革、并建立可持续的高绩效体系。这套书籍是领导者、管理者、顾问及所有希望提升战略与执行能力者的重要知识宝库。

item.title: Endorsements
item.content:encoded:
Endorsements

Praise for Corporate Turnaround

Endorsers

What Leaders Say About This Book

Professor Philip Kotler

“Dr. Teng offers a promising and insightful programme for restoring life to troubled companies. His book contains a very important message for the many ailing companies in Asia and elsewhere, namely that there are workable diagnostic and therapeutic steps to cure the patient and restore health.”

S. C. Johnson Distinguished Professor of International Marketing, Northwestern University, US.

Professor Vijay Mahajan

“This ground-breaking book expounds turnaround concepts such as surgery, resuscitation and nursing which are at the leading edge of turnaround management. A recommended reading for all business schools and executives interested in building strong enterprises.”

John P. Harbin Centennial Chair in Business, The University of Texas at Austin, US.

Dr. David Ahlstrom

“Corporate Turnaround provides clearly the steps needed to turnaround a firm’s performance in the challenging Asian environment, where numerous pitfalls await the uninitiated. A must reading for those interested in Asian business.”

Department of Management, Chinese University of Hong Kong, Hong Kong.

Mr. Ronald M Bradfield

“Corporate Turnaround: Nursing a Sick Company Back to Health is a must-read for all businessmen whether the businesses they run are sick or not… Here is a book full of practical advice on how to nurture and regenerate an ailing company by someone who has actually done it more than once.”

Academic Director Asia, University of Strathclyde, UK.

Mr. Chou Fang Soong

“Many multi-national companies operating in Asia will find this book relevant in the Asian context… It provides a comprehensive plan for beleaguered companies to get out of the red as well as enjoy holistic and long-term recovery.”

Managing Director, Gemplus Technologies Asia, Singapore.

Mr. Harry Chua

“This book is very practice oriented, extremely informative and an asset for executives in both ailing and healthy enterprises.”

Chairman, Herxing Corporation Ltd, Singapore.

Dr. Robin Lau

“Dr. Teng’s book is very useful, beneficial and a great panacea for many sick and weak manufacturing companies in Singapore and the world. The turnaround techniques are systematically presented, thought-provoking and inspiring. An excellent reference guide for businessmen, executives, professionals and people who are interested to improve their company’s performance.”

President, Singapore Confederation of Industries, Singapore.

Mr. Peter K W Leong

“This book is a useful reference for corporate turnaround practitioners and a wealth of knowledge for those who desire to learn the craft from an accomplished individual.”

Group Financial Controller, Comfort Group Ltd, Singapore.

Mr. Lau Beng Chye

“The ingenious use of the medical analogy between a human being and a company distinguishes this from other corporate turnaround books. It is interesting reading and makes complex turnaround concepts easy to follow and recall. All CEOs, managers and executives are recommended to read this book.”

Chairman, Chartered Management Institute, Singapore Branch.

Professor Subhash Mehta

“Interesting, insightful and rewarding.”

Visiting Professor, Faculty of Business and Commerce, University of South Queensland, Australia.

Professor Kevin O’Brien

“Dr. Mike Teng has used his substantial experience in corporate rescues to write a book combining his own experience, western management theory and an Asian perspective to discuss successful approaches to turnaround situations. Its particular relevance to Asian business is an important contribution of this work by an author who has both practical experience and a strong academic background.”

Pro Vice-Chancellor, University of South Australia, Australia.

Mr. Oei Hong Leong

“Dr. Teng’s book is practical, relevant and useful during this global economic slump. His three phases of corporate turnaround, namely surgery, resuscitation and nursing, are workable and applicable to the restoration of many sick companies in Asia. I would highly recommend this book to CEOs, managers and top civil servants who are trying to steer their organisations out of the economic doldrums.”

Chairman, China Strategic Holdings Ltd, Hong Kong.

Mr. E C Ong

“This book will aid many multi-national companies operating in Asia. It shows the pathways to success as well as the risks and pitfalls involved.”

General Manager, Baxter Healthcare Pte Ltd, Singapore.

Mr. Jose Jesus F Roces

“Dr. Teng… has developed recipes that will transform a critically-ill corporate entity into a healthy organization… A must-read during these turbulent times.”

Associate Professor, Executive Education, Asian Institute of Management (AIM), Philippines.

Mr. Gregory Tan

“Calling all CEOs and corporate managers! If you are looking for a good book to flip your company the right way round, this is THE one. It will guide you all the way from the beginning of your company’s journey right up to the point where it is full steam ahead. Truly inspirational.”

President, Institute of Public Relations, Singapore. Chairman, Federation of ASEAN PR Organisations.

Professor Wee Chow Hou

“An easy to read and understand book that provides some interesting perspectives which includes the use of medical jargons and metaphors.”

Professor of Strategy, Management and Organisation, Nanyang Technological University, Singapore.

Dr. Y Y Wong

“Corporate Turnaround, is a rare book. Dr. Mike Teng… is able to offer revolutionary insights that promise universal applications with total clarity.”

Chairman, The Wyre Group, Singapore. Chairman, Pacific Business Economic Council.

Professor Mike Wood

“Dr. Teng has written a practical and relevant book born out of his own leadership and experience in organisational turnaround. Leaders, university staff and students will find its international and local dimensions very helpful and the medical analogy innovative and instructive.”

Executive Dean, Curtin Business School, Australia.

Dr. Diana Young

“Many ailing small and medium enterprises will benefit from the information shared in this book. Those that are already doing well will also find this book helpful for scaling new heights.”

Past President, Association of Small and Medium Enterprises, Singapore.

item.title: Media Coverage
item.content:encoded:
Media Coverage

Video and audio interviews featuring Dr Mike Teng

Video Interviews

Television & Video Appearances

English Videos

Corporate Turnaround Strategy

CNA Tonight: Finding New Niches

How Singapore Companies Can Transform with Business Model Innovation

Improving Productivity Innovatively and Innovation Productively

SMF SiPi: Overview of Strategic Management

Interview on SME Transformation

The Future of SMEs in Singapore

Overcoming Business Stagnation

The Role of Innovation in SME Growth

Business Transformation: From Survival to Success

Strategies for Internationalizing Your Business

The Importance of Productivity for Singapore Companies

Adapting to Disruptive Change in Business

Mandarin Videos

中小企业如何转型 (How SMEs Can Transform)

Mandarin

中小企业在经济衰退中的生存策略

Survival Strategies for SMEs in a Recession (Mandarin)

Audio Interviews

Radio & Podcast Appearances

BFM Podcast

Building Your Business Online 101

Dr Michael Teng discusses corporate turnaround services and strategies for building business online.

Listen Now →
NewsRadio 93.8FM

Positive Business Minutes: Corporate Turnaround

Featured segment on corporate turnaround strategies and practical advice for business recovery.

Listen Now →

item.title: Playlist
item.content:encoded:
Corporate Turnaround Playlist

40 curated videos on corporate turnaround and transformation

The Corporate Turnaround Playlist is 40 curated videos on corporate turnaround and transformation. It is a proprietary learning collection built from the distilled insights of Dr. Teng’s extensive body of work on leadership, transformation, and organisational renewal. Each video translates complex management principles into clear, practical lessons enriched with real-world relevance, supported by engaging music and meaningful lyrics to make learning both impactful and enjoyable. Together, these curated themes provide leaders, managers, and consultants with a comprehensive, experience-based guide to driving sustainable corporate recovery and high-performance transformation.

Category 1

Leadership, Mindset & CEO Stewardship

This category focuses on strengthening leadership clarity, courage, and conviction. The videos help CEOs and senior executives reset their mindset, embrace accountability, and lead transformation with purpose and discipline. They reinforce the belief that turnaround begins at the top.

Awakening the Turnaround Leader Within

Courage to Confront Harsh Reality

Stewardship at the Top: CEO as Custodian

From Blame to Ownership in Leadership

Leading Through Crisis with Calm Resolve

The CEO’s Personal Turnaround Journey

Category 2

Strategy, Business Model & Competitive Positioning

These videos provide sharp insights into strategic thinking, business model redesign, and competitive advantage. They guide leaders in diagnosing structural weaknesses, repositioning the organisation, and crafting strategies that restore relevance and long-term viability.

Seeing the Big Picture: Strategic Clarity

Rethinking the Business Model for Survival

Regaining Competitive Edge in a Crowded Market

Strategic Choices that Shape the Future

Turning Insight into Strategic Action

Category 3

Financial Discipline, Cashflow & Cost Management

This category highlights the financial foundations of a successful turnaround. The videos emphasise cash discipline, cost optimisation, and financial transparency—equipping leaders with the tools to stabilise performance and rebuild organisational confidence.

Cash is King: Protecting the Lifeblood

Seeing the Numbers, Telling the Truth

Cost Discipline without Killing the Business

Restoring Financial Confidence Step by Step

From Losses to Discipline: A Financial Reset

Managing Stakeholder Expectations in Tough Times

Category 4

People, Culture & Organisational Renewal

These videos explore the human side of transformation, focusing on culture, morale, and team alignment. They show how trust, communication, and shared purpose can energise the workforce and create a resilient, high-performance organisation.

Culture as the Hidden Engine of Turnaround

Rebuilding Trust After Organisational Pain

Engaging Hearts and Minds for Change

From Silos to One Team

Nurturing a Renewed, Resilient Workforce

Category 5

Execution Excellence & Operational Turnaround

This category reinforces the importance of disciplined execution. The videos demonstrate how systems, processes, and operational rigour drive sustainable results, ensuring that strategy is translated into consistent, measurable performance.

Execution: Where Turnaround Becomes Real

Fixing Broken Processes, One Step at a Time

Discipline, Rhythm and Follow-Through

Turning Plans into Daily Operational Reality

Measuring What Matters in Turnaround

Category 6

Innovation, Digitalisation & Future-Readiness

These videos highlight the role of innovation and technology in shaping the future of the organisation. They encourage leaders to embrace digital transformation, rethink traditional models, and build capabilities that ensure long-term competitiveness.

Innovating Out of Decline

Digital as a Turnaround Accelerator

Rethinking Value in a Digital World

Building Future-Ready Capabilities

From Legacy to Learning Organisation

Category 7

Inspirational, Motivational & High-Performance Themes

This category uses music, storytelling, and emotional resonance to inspire action and reinforce key lessons. The videos energise learners, making complex concepts memorable while motivating leaders to pursue excellence with passion and purpose.

Rising Again: The Spirit of Turnaround

Hope in the Midst of Corporate Crisis

The Rhythm of High Performance

Songs of Renewal and New Beginnings

Finding Strength in Adversity

Turning Pain into Purpose

Celebrating Small Wins on the Journey

A New Day for the Organisation

item.title: Case Studies
item.content:encoded:
Case Studies

Success Cases: The Three Turnaround Methodology

The following case studies demonstrate the practical application and success of the Three Turnaround Methodology in real-world scenarios.

(Note: Company names have been kept strictly confidential at the request of the companies.)

Case A: The Surgical Process

Diagnosis: An SME Afflicted with Corporate Cancer

Company A was a Small and Medium-sized Enterprise (SME) specializing in the manufacturing and trading of industrial products. Diagnosed with 'corporate cancer,' the disease was fortunately caught early enough to save the business. While it didn't require a funeral service just yet, the company urgently needed to be placed in the intensive care unit for a complete business overhaul.

During its heyday in the 1960s, Company A boasted a thriving string of product lines spanning from A to Z. However, its fortunes took a sharp dive in the 1990s when direct sourcing became prevalent, significantly diminishing its role as a middleman. As its raison d'etre faltered, the lack of direction turned the company into a 'jack-of-all-trades, master of none.' Departments operated in silos with scant regard for profitability, and the unstructured organization was weighed down by an unsystematic, laissez-faire management style.

Clinical Profile
  • Background: Local SME (Trading & Manufacturing of Industrial Products)
  • Core Problems: Shrinking market share, declining margins, high overheads, and unfocused business activities
  • Direction: Jack-of-all-trades, master of none
  • Orientation: Unsystematic
  • Management Style: Laissez-faire
  • Structure: No regard for overall profitability
  • Communication: Fragmented (each department operating independently)

Through the Surgical Process, Company A executed a successful turnaround within the first year, returning to profitability. In the subsequent years, the company went on to achieve the highest record profits in its entire history.

Case B: The Resuscitation Process

Diagnosis: A Multinational Company with a Heart Problem

Company B was a Multinational Company (MNC) operating in the contracting and engineering sector. Similar to many established companies that eventually turn into 'old dinosaurs,' Company B was weighed down by a lack of new initiatives to revitalize its core business. It had grown too bloated and was suffering from a severe 'corporate heart problem.'

Its primary conundrums were eroding margins, sustained financial losses, and high staff turnover. Drifting aimlessly with the tide, the company's orientation was heavily technically biased - taking on projects for the sheer love of the technical challenge rather than being market-oriented - and entirely reactive. Management was remote, top-down, and impersonal. The organization was paralyzed by incessant infighting, and a closed communication style fueled strong rumor mills. As Sun Tzu noted: 'The sight of whispering together in small knots or speaking in subdued tones points to disaffection among the rank and file.'

Clinical Profile
  • Background: Foreign MNC (Contracting & Engineering)
  • Core Problems: Eroding margins, loss-making, high staff turnover
  • Direction: Drifting aimlessly
  • Orientation: Technical bias, reactive rather than proactive
  • Management Style: Remote, top-down, impersonal
  • Structure: Weakened by internal conflicts and infighting
  • Communication: Closed, dominated by rumor mills

Following the Resuscitation Process, Company B returned to profitability within a single year. The company successfully transformed its operations to pivot toward a brand-new, sustainable business model.

Case C: The Therapy & Nursing Process

Diagnosis: An Organization with a Weak Immune System

Company C was a marketing organization dealing in a variety of services. Despite boasting a highly experienced staff, the company continuously lagged behind the rest of the industry. The root cause was a severely weakened 'immune system' caused by a dysfunctional corporate culture inherited from the past.

The staff suffered from a non-committal attitude, a total lack of urgency, and a deeply negative mentality. This culture was heavily inclined toward a bo chap (a Hokkien term for a 'cannot be bothered') attitude, resulting in a highly demotivated workforce. As a direct result, the company's service quality deteriorated, morale hit rock bottom, and the business was trapped in a cycle of constant fire-fighting rather than proactive growth.

Clinical Profile
  • Background: Marketing of Services
  • Core Problems: Dysfunctional corporate culture, severely lagging behind industry standards, deteriorating service quality
  • Orientation: Reactive fire-fighting, "bo chap" attitude
  • Management Development: Zero succession planning
  • Training: Merely lip service
  • Rewards: Driven by favoritism
  • Performance Management: Overly tolerant of underperformance

Using the Therapy and Nursing Process, the corporate culture was entirely transformed to become innovative, fast, and flexible. Earnings drastically improved from a mere breakeven position, and within two years, Company C rose to become the recognized leader in its industry.
